infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: H2O Watch needs camera access to scan water test strips, identify pollution, and detect items for water-footprint analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: H2O Watch needs photo library access to analyze images of test strips, pollution, and items.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: H2O Watch may save annotated analysis results to your photos.

plugins.photosPermission: H2O Watch accesses your photos to analyze water test strips, pollution samples, and items for water-footprint estimates.
plugins.cameraPermission: H2O Watch uses your camera to scan water test strips, pollution, and items.
